official_record.download_note: WCH download endpoint returned an anti-abuse refresh response without an interactive browser session.

sop16_pinout.name: V3
sop16_pinout.manufacturer_requirement: tie to VCC for 3.3V supply; decouple with 0.1uF for 5V supply

sop16_pinout.name: UD+
sop16_pinout.manufacturer_requirement: connect directly to USB D+ without series resistor

sop16_pinout.name: UD-
sop16_pinout.manufacturer_requirement: connect directly to USB D- without series resistor

sop16_pinout.name: OUT#
sop16_pinout.lot_dependent_alternate: second DTR# only for qualifying lots

manufacturer_layout_constraints: Place V3 and VCC decoupling capacitors as close as possible to their CH340 pins.
Route D+ and D- close together and in parallel.
Provide ground traces or ground copper on both sides where practical to reduce interference.
Do not add external series resistors to UD+ or UD-.
pending_verification: Select the actual JLCPCB stackup and calculate the 90-ohm differential width and spacing.
Verify the USB-C connector pin mapping and both duplicated D+/D- pins on the actual PCB.
Verify decoupling quantity, values, placement and ground return on the actual PCB.
Review ESD protection parasitic capacitance, placement and discharge return path.
Verify no dependency on lot-specific CH340C 5V-tolerance or alternate-DTR behavior.
Perform Gerber readback, continuity checks, USB enumeration and sustained UART testing on a physical board.
